goal: 给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有 markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Fix static/index.html to add missing element IDs (doc-content, editor elements) and ensure all containers match what JS expects
Implement directory tree rendering (recursive collapsible file browser) and tag cloud rendering with click-to-filter in app.js
Implement document display (rendered HTML, metadata, backlinks panel, wiki-link navigation) and search result interaction
Implement inline markdown editor with save functionality (toggle edit mode, textarea with raw markdown, save via POST /api/doc)
Start the Flask server, verify all pages load, test tree/tag/search/doc-view/edit/wiki-link flows end-to-end, fix any remaining issues
